name: Spy Rise
description: Spy Rise is a spider-like SWAP Force Skylander in Skylanders: Swap Force. His SWAP Force Ability is Climb.
biography: From the moment he could crawl, Spy Rise wanted nothing more than to join his father in the family business as a private investigator. But after being hired by a shadowy figure to gather information on the Cloudbreak Islands, his father vanished, leaving Spy Rise alone to search for answers. He scoured the land for clues, using his immense skill in reconnaissance to track down his missing father, but all roads came up empty. Then one day, he received a tip from none other than Master Eon, which led him to a hidden lair near Mt. Cloudbreak, where he not only found his long lost father, but also uncovered an evil plot to take control of the magical volcano during the next eruption ceremony. With his father safe, Spy Rise decided to pursue a new career -- as a member of the Skylanders.
personality: Spy Rise never gives up. The persistent P.I. sticks with a job until everything's wrapped up.

story.content: It was Spy Rise's intel that lured the villainous Captain Frightbeard to the Skylanders when they were trekking a river on their way to the Wilikin Village. Spreading the rumor of a treasure onboard the ship, the result brought the evil seadog and his crew to the ship where the Skylanders launched an attack on the unsuspecting pirates. When Spyro was distracted by his weakened fire breath, Spy Rise saved his dragon companion from being swiped by Frightbeard's sword, allowing Wallop to deliver the finishing blow to Frightbeard. Afterwards the Skylanders wondered why Spyro's fire powers weren't working.

content: “Fortune favors the brave!” - finding treasure chests
“Into the air!”- using a Bounce Pad
“A master of disguise!” - equipping a hat
“You know, this is classified information.” - checking stats

trivia: Spy Rise's bottom half is capable of avoiding damage from bombs and mines as well as wiping them out while performing Spyder Climb.
He and Wash Buckler are the only two SWAP Force Skylanders with a Climb Ability.

Spy Rise is ambidextrous, as demonstrated whenever he uses his Spyder Shooter and Spyder Scanner S3 with his left hand whereas he uses his right one for the Spyder Sting, Cocoon Spinner and/or Electroweb Pulse Bomb.
He is the only Skylander capable of measuring enemies' health bars, with his Spyder Scanner S3. The only other toy with this ability is the Sun Runner.
When he performs the Spyder Climb, he is capable of wiping out explosive mines without receiving damage. He can also avoid getting hit by enemies and bosses.
While standing still, he sneezes, making his goggles fall onto his face and obscuring his eyes until he lifts them back onto his forehead.
If you look really closely at Spy Rise's left hand while using Cocoon Spinner, it is quite similar to how Spider-Man shoots a web from the Marvel Comics.
Spy Rise is voiced by J.B. Blanc, who also voices Hood Sickle.
He and Blast Zone are the only Swap Force Skylanders to not wear a belt.
If he has Boom Jet's legs, he is called Spy Jet, the shortest name of all the SWAP Force combinations.
His Spyder Scanner S3 is a pun on the Samsung Galaxy S3.
He is one of the few Swap Force Skylanders to not have any counterparts or variants. The others are Boom Jet, Stink Bomb, Trap Shadow, Doom Stone and Rubble Rouser.
He and Dr. Krankcase are similar in the following ways: Both are Tech-elemental characters, both have range weapons, both have spider-like legs, and both have goggles on their foreheads.
His name is a play on 'high rise'.
The name of Spy Rise's top half 'Spy' is the shortest of all the SWAP Force's top halves, having only three letters.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Spy Rise (It's Classified)-0
Skylanders Swap Force - Spy Rise Soul Gem Preview (It's Classified)

gameplay: These are the starting and maximum Statistics for this Skylander in the Skylanders games. Health: 270 (max. 540), Speed: 43 (max. 91), Armor: 18 (max. 48), Critical Hit: 8 (max. 58), Elemental Power: 25 (max. 75). In the 3DS version, Skylanders can use abilities depending on their level, including Starting Powers like Web Blaster, Super Spy Scanner, and the Climb SWAP Power.

basic.name: Spyder Blaster
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot 3 Spyder projectiles that slow any enemies it hits.

basic.name: Spyder Climb
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to climb into the air with electro web, dropping back down will damage nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Spyder Scanner S3
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 3 for a short time to scan enemies, release to shoot a high-powered laser. Fully scanned enemies take additional damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Spyder Sting
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 1 next to an enemy with low health to sting them and steal some health!

basic_upgrades.name: Future Tech
basic_upgrades.content: Super Spy Scanner S3 and Spyder Blaster do increased damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Spyder Mine
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to climb into the air and drop a Spyder mine that will seek out and explode on nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Spyder Mine 002
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to climb into the air, dropping two Spyder mines at once.

basic_upgrades.name: Rapid Laser Legs V17
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to climb into the air, Hold Attack 2 while in the air to drop down and shoot electric bolts at enemies.

soulgems.name: Spy with a Golden Hand
soulgems.content: Gain a new golden blaster that shoots five projectiles at once.

soulgems.name: Omega Sky Laser
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 1 while in the sky to shoot down a massive laser that stuns enemies.

abilities.name: Cocoon Spinner
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to shoot a stream of web projectiles that slow and cocoon enemies.

abilities.name: Experimental Webs
abilities.content: Cocoon Spinner does increased damage. The experiment seems to be going well!

abilities.name: Electroweb Pulse Bomb
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge a web bomb, release to throw it which damages and slows enemies in a larger area.

abilities.name: Improved EPB
abilities.content: Electroweb Pulse Bomb does increased damage and has a larger explosion.

abilities.name: Foot-Mounted Flame
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to shoot flames from the feet, damaging any enemies that come too close.

abilities.name: Blue Flame
abilities.content: Flamethrower deals increased damage. Experimental feet fuel turns flames blue!

abilities.name: Pulse Cannon
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge a laser blast, release to shoot a massive wave of energy at enemies.

abilities.name: Advanced Pulse Cannon
abilities.content: Increase damage of pulse cannon. At least this one isn't experimental, right?
